93 {

95 {
96 dictionary.Add(text.ToLower(), text2);

99 text2 = "";

102 {
103 if (text2 != "")
104 {
105 text2 += " ";
106 }
107 text2 += args[i];
108 }
109 }
110 }
111 if (text != null)
112 {
113 dictionary.Add(text.ToLower(), text2);

115 return dictionary;

168 public static void Shift<T>(T[] array, int n)
169 {
170 if (n == 0 || n >= array.Length || n <= -array.Length)
171 {
172 return;
173 }
174 if (n > 0)
175 {
176 if (n < array.Length)
177 {
178 Array.Copy(array, 0, array, n, array.Length - n);
179 return;
180 }
181 }
182 else if (n > -array.Length)
183 {
184 Array.Copy(array, -n, array, 0, array.Length + n);
185 }
186 }

195 {

197 num3++;
198 }
199 return MathHelper.Lerp(floats[num3], floats[num3 + 1], (percent - num * (float)num3) / num);

228 public static float GetLerpValue(float from, float to, float t, bool clamped = false)
229 {
230 if (clamped)
231 {
232 if (from < to)
233 {
234 if (t < from)
235 {
236 return 0f;
237 }
238 if (t > to)
239 {
240 return 1f;
241 }
242 }
243 else
244 {
245 if (t < to)
246 {
247 return 1f;
248 }
249 if (t > from)
250 {
251 return 0f;
252 }
253 }
254 }
255 return (t - from) / (to - from);
256 }

395 public static Vector2 ConstrainedToPointInRectangle(Rectangle bounds, Vector2 centerTestPosition)
396 {
397 if (bounds.Contains(centerTestPosition.ToPoint()))
398 {
399 return centerTestPosition;
400 }
401 Vector2 vector = new Vector2((float)bounds.Center.X, (float)bounds.Center.Y);
402 Vector2 vector2 = vector - centerTestPosition;
403 float num = ((vector2.X == 0f) ? float.MaxValue : Math.Abs((vector.X - (float)(bounds.Width / 2) - centerTestPosition.X) / vector2.X));
404 float num2 = ((vector2.Y == 0f) ? float.MaxValue : Math.Abs((vector.Y - (float)(bounds.Height / 2) - centerTestPosition.Y) / vector2.Y));
405 float num3 = Math.Min(num, num2);
406 Vector2 vector3 = centerTestPosition + vector2 * num3;
407 vector3.X = MathHelper.Clamp(vector3.X, (float)bounds.Left, (float)bounds.Right);
408 vector3.Y = MathHelper.Clamp(vector3.Y, (float)bounds.Top, (float)bounds.Bottom);
409 return vector3;
410 }

413 private static bool CheckForGoodTeleportationSpot_CheckNoInvalidTiles(int tpx, int tpy, Utils.RandomTeleportationAttemptSettings settings)
414 {
415 if (settings.tilesToAvoidRange > 0 && settings.tilesToAvoid != null)
416 {
417 int tilesToAvoidRange = settings.tilesToAvoidRange;
418 for (int i = -tilesToAvoidRange; i <= tilesToAvoidRange; i++)
419 {
420 for (int j = -tilesToAvoidRange; j <= tilesToAvoidRange; j++)
421 {
422 int num = tpx + i;
423 int num2 = tpy + j;
424 if (WorldGen.InWorld(num, num2, 2))
425 {
426 Tile tile = Main.tile[num, num2];
427 if (tile != null && tile.active())
428 {
429 ushort type = tile.type;
430 for (int k = 0; k < settings.tilesToAvoid.Length; k++)
431 {
432 if ((int)type == settings.tilesToAvoid[k])
433 {
434 return false;
435 }
436 }
437 }
438 }
439 }
440 }
441 }
442 return true;
443 }

449 int num2 = (int)settings.teleporteeSize.Y;

453 int num3 = 0;

455 int num5 = 0;

457 Vector2 vector = new Vector2((float)num4, (float)num5) * 16f + new Vector2((float)(-(float)num6 / 2 + 8), (float)(-(float)num2));
458 while (!canSpawn && num3 < settings.attemptsBeforeGivingUp)
459 {
460 num3++;
461 num4 = teleportStartX + Main.rand.Next(teleportRangeX);
462 num5 = teleportStartY + Main.rand.Next(teleportRangeY);
463 int num7 = 45;
464 num4 = (int)MathHelper.Clamp((float)num4, (float)num7, (float)(Main.maxTilesX - num7));
465 num5 = (int)MathHelper.Clamp((float)num5, (float)num7, (float)(Main.maxTilesY - num7));
466 if (!settings.strictRange || rectangle.Contains(new Point(num4, num5)))
467 {
468 vector = new Vector2((float)num4, (float)num5) * 16f + new Vector2((float)(-(float)num6 / 2 + 8), (float)(-(float)num2));
469 if (!Collision.SolidCollision(vector, num6, num2))
470 {
471 if (Main.tile[num4, num5] == null)
472 {
473 Main.tile[num4, num5] = new Tile();
474 }
475 Tile tile = Main.tile[num4, num5];
476 if ((!settings.avoidWalls || tile.wall <= 0) && (tile.wall != 87 || (double)num5 <= Main.worldSurface || NPC.downedPlantBoss) && (!Main.wallDungeon[(int)tile.wall] || (double)num5 <= Main.worldSurface || NPC.downedBoss3) && Utils.CheckForGoodTeleportationSpot_CheckNoInvalidTiles(num4, num5, settings))
477 {
478 bool flag = false;
479 int i = 0;
480 while (i < settings.maximumFallDistanceFromOrignalPoint)
481 {
482 if (settings.strictRange && !rectangle.Contains(new Point(num4, num5 + i)))
483 {
484 flag = true;
485 break;
486 }
487 if (Main.tile[num4, num5 + i] == null)
488 {
489 Main.tile[num4, num5 + i] = new Tile();
490 }
491 Tile tile2 = Main.tile[num4, num5 + i];
492 vector = new Vector2((float)num4, (float)(num5 + i)) * 16f + new Vector2((float)(-(float)num6 / 2 + 8), (float)(-(float)num2));
493 Collision.SlopeCollision(vector, teleporteeVelocity, num6, num2, teleporteeGravityDirection, false, false);
494 if (!Collision.SolidCollision(vector, num6, num2 + 1, settings.allowSolidTopFloor))
495 {
496 i++;
497 }
498 else
499 {
500 if (tile2.active() && !tile2.inActive() && Main.tileSolid[(int)tile2.type])
501 {
502 break;
503 }
504 i++;
505 }
506 }
507 if (!flag)
508 {
509 int num8 = (int)vector.X / 16;
510 int num9 = (int)vector.Y / 16;
511 if (Utils.CheckForGoodTeleportationSpot_CheckNoInvalidTiles(num8, num9, settings))
512 {
513 int num10 = (int)(vector.X + (float)num6 * 0.5f) / 16;
514 int num11 = (int)(vector.Y + (float)num2) / 16;
515 Tile tileSafely = Framing.GetTileSafely(num8, num9);
516 Tile tileSafely2 = Framing.GetTileSafely(num10, num11);
517 if ((settings.specializedConditions == null || settings.specializedConditions(tileSafely2, num10, num11)) && (!settings.avoidAnyLiquid || tileSafely2.liquid <= 0))
518 {
519 if (settings.mostlySolidFloor)
520 {
521 Tile tileSafely3 = Framing.GetTileSafely(num10 - 1, num11);
522 Tile tileSafely4 = Framing.GetTileSafely(num10 + 1, num11);
523 bool flag2;
524 bool flag3;
525 if (settings.allowSolidTopFloor)
526 {
527 flag2 = !tileSafely3.inActive() && WorldGen.SolidTileAllowBottomSlope(num10 - 1, num11);
528 flag3 = !tileSafely4.inActive() && WorldGen.SolidTileAllowBottomSlope(num10 + 1, num11);
529 }
530 else
531 {
532 flag2 = tileSafely3.active() && !tileSafely3.inActive() && Main.tileSolid[(int)tileSafely3.type] && !Main.tileSolidTop[(int)tileSafely3.type];
533 flag3 = tileSafely4.active() && !tileSafely4.inActive() && Main.tileSolid[(int)tileSafely4.type] && !Main.tileSolidTop[(int)tileSafely4.type];
534 }
535 if (!flag2 && !flag3)
536 {
537 continue;
538 }
539 }
540 if ((!settings.avoidWalls || tileSafely.wall <= 0) && (!settings.avoidAnyLiquid || !Collision.WetCollision(vector, num6, num2)) && (!settings.avoidLava || !Collision.LavaCollision(vector, num6, num2)) && (!settings.avoidHurtTiles || !Collision.AnyHurtingTiles(vector, num6, num2)) && !Collision.SolidCollision(vector, num6, num2, settings.allowSolidTopFloor) && i < settings.maximumFallDistanceFromOrignalPoint - 1)
541 {
542 Vector2 vector2 = Vector2.UnitX * 16f;
543 if (!(Collision.TileCollision(vector - vector2, vector2, num, num2, false, false, (int)teleporteeGravityDirection, false, false, true) != vector2))
544 {
545 vector2 = -Vector2.UnitX * 16f;
546 if (!(Collision.TileCollision(vector - vector2, vector2, num, num2, false, false, (int)teleporteeGravityDirection, false, false, true) != vector2))
547 {
548 vector2 = Vector2.UnitY * 16f;
549 if (!(Collision.TileCollision(vector - vector2, vector2, num, num2, false, false, (int)teleporteeGravityDirection, false, false, true) != vector2))
550 {
551 vector2 = -Vector2.UnitY * 16f;
552 if (!(Collision.TileCollision(vector - vector2, vector2, num, num2, false, false, (int)teleporteeGravityDirection, false, false, true) != vector2) && (!Main.dualDungeonsSeed || !UnbreakableWallScan.InsideUnbreakableWalls(new Point(num8, num9))))

572 // Token: 0x06000F59 RID: 3929 RVA: 0x0040C2F0 File Offset: 0x0040A4F0
573 public static Utils.ChaseResults GetChaseResults(Vector2 chaserPosition, float chaserSpeed, Vector2 runnerPosition, Vector2 runnerVelocity)
574 {
575 Utils.ChaseResults chaseResults = default(Utils.ChaseResults);
576 if (chaserPosition == runnerPosition)
577 {
578 return new Utils.ChaseResults
579 {
580 InterceptionHappens = true,
581 InterceptionPosition = chaserPosition,
582 InterceptionTime = 0f,
583 ChaserVelocity = Vector2.Zero
584 };
585 }
586 if (chaserSpeed <= 0f)
587 {
588 return default(Utils.ChaseResults);
589 }
590 Vector2 vector = chaserPosition - runnerPosition;
591 float num = vector.Length();
592 float num2 = runnerVelocity.Length();
593 if (num2 == 0f)
594 {
595 chaseResults.InterceptionTime = num / chaserSpeed;
596 chaseResults.InterceptionPosition = runnerPosition;
597 }
598 else
599 {
600 float num3 = chaserSpeed * chaserSpeed - num2 * num2;
601 float num4 = 2f * Vector2.Dot(vector, runnerVelocity);
602 float num5 = -num * num;
603 float num6;
604 float num7;
605 if (!Utils.SolveQuadratic(num3, num4, num5, out num6, out num7))
606 {
607 return default(Utils.ChaseResults);
608 }
609 if (num6 < 0f && num7 < 0f)
610 {
611 return default(Utils.ChaseResults);
612 }
613 if (num6 > 0f && num7 > 0f)
614 {
615 chaseResults.InterceptionTime = Math.Min(num6, num7);
616 }
617 else
618 {
619 chaseResults.InterceptionTime = Math.Max(num6, num7);
620 }
621 chaseResults.InterceptionPosition = runnerPosition + runnerVelocity * chaseResults.InterceptionTime;
622 }
623 chaseResults.ChaserVelocity = (chaseResults.InterceptionPosition - chaserPosition) / chaseResults.InterceptionTime;
624 chaseResults.InterceptionHappens = true;
625 return chaseResults;
626 }
627
628 // Token: 0x06000F5A RID: 3930 RVA: 0x0040C454 File Offset: 0x0040A654
629 public static float GetJumpForce(float jumpHeight, float atGravity)
630 {
631 return (float)Math.Sqrt((double)(jumpHeight / atGravity * 2f)) * atGravity;
632 }
633
634 // Token: 0x06000F5B RID: 3931 RVA: 0x0040C478 File Offset: 0x0040A678
635 public static float GetJumpTimeToApex(float jumpHeight, float atGravity)
636 {
637 return (float)Math.Sqrt((double)(jumpHeight / atGravity * 2f));
638 }
639
640 // Token: 0x06000F5C RID: 3932 RVA: 0x0040C498 File Offset: 0x0040A698
641 public static Vector2 FactorAcceleration(Vector2 currentVelocity, float timeToInterception, Vector2 descendOfProjectile, int framesOfLenience)
642 {
643 float num = Math.Max(0f, timeToInterception - (float)framesOfLenience);
644 Vector2 vector = descendOfProjectile * (num * num) / 2f / timeToInterception;
645 return currentVelocity - vector;
646 }
647
648 // Token: 0x06000F5D RID: 3933 RVA: 0x0040C4D8 File Offset: 0x0040A6D8
649 public static bool SolveQuadratic(float a, float b, float c, out float result1, out float result2)
650 {
651 float num = b * b - 4f * a * c;
652 result1 = 0f;
653 result2 = 0f;
654 if (num > 0f)
655 {
656 result1 = (-b + (float)Math.Sqrt((double)num)) / (2f * a);
657 result2 = (-b - (float)Math.Sqrt((double)num)) / (2f * a);
658 return true;
659 }
660 if (num < 0f)
661 {
662 return false;
663 }
664 result1 = (result2 = (-b + (float)Math.Sqrt((double)num)) / (2f * a));
665 return true;
666 }
667
668 // Token: 0x06000F5E RID: 3934 RVA: 0x0040C560 File Offset: 0x0040A760
669 public static double GetLerpValue(double from, double to, double t, bool clamped = false)
670 {
671 if (clamped)
672 {
673 if (from < to)
674 {
675 if (t < from)
676 {
677 return 0.0;
678 }
679 if (t > to)
680 {
681 return 1.0;
682 }
683 }
684 else
685 {
686 if (t < to)
687 {
688 return 1.0;
689 }
690 if (t > from)
691 {
692 return 0.0;
693 }
694 }
695 }
696 return (t - from) / (to - from);
697 }
698
699 // Token: 0x06000F5F RID: 3935 RVA: 0x0040C5B4 File Offset: 0x0040A7B4
700 public static float GetDayTimeAs24FloatStartingFromMidnight()
701 {
702 if (Main.dayTime)
703 {
704 return 4.5f + (float)(Main.time / 54000.0) * 15f;
705 }
706 return 19.5f + (float)(Main.time / 32400.0) * 9f;
707 }

716 public static Vector2 GetDayTimeAsDirectionIn24HClock(float timeFrom0To24)

719 }

721 // Token: 0x06000F62 RID: 3938 RVA: 0x0040C648 File Offset: 0x0040A848
722 public static string[] ConvertMonoArgsToDotNet(string[] brokenArgs)
723 {
724 ArrayList arrayList = new ArrayList();
725 string text = "";
726 for (int i = 0; i < brokenArgs.Length; i++)
727 {
728 if (brokenArgs[i].StartsWith("-"))
729 {
730 if (text != "")
731 {
732 arrayList.Add(text);
733 text = "";
734 }
735 else
736 {
737 arrayList.Add("");
738 }
739 arrayList.Add(brokenArgs[i]);
740 }
741 else
742 {
743 if (text != "")
744 {
745 text += " ";
746 }
747 text += brokenArgs[i];
748 }
749 }
750 arrayList.Add(text);
751 string[] array = new string[arrayList.Count];
752 arrayList.CopyTo(array);
753 return array;
754 }
755
756 // Token: 0x06000F63 RID: 3939 RVA: 0x0040C6F4 File Offset: 0x0040A8F4
757 public static T Max<T>(params T[] args) where T : IComparable
758 {
759 T t = args[0];
760 for (int i = 1; i < args.Length; i++)
761 {
762 if (t.CompareTo(args[i]) < 0)
763 {
764 t = args[i];
765 }
766 }
767 return t;
768 }
769
770 // Token: 0x06000F64 RID: 3940 RVA: 0x0040C73C File Offset: 0x0040A93C
771 public static float LineRectangleDistance(Rectangle rect, Vector2 lineStart, Vector2 lineEnd)
772 {
773 Vector2 vector = rect.TopLeft();
774 Vector2 vector2 = rect.TopRight();
775 Vector2 vector3 = rect.BottomLeft();
776 Vector2 vector4 = rect.BottomRight();
777 if (lineStart.Between(vector, vector4) || lineEnd.Between(vector, vector4))
778 {
779 return 0f;
780 }
781 float num = vector.Distance(vector.ClosestPointOnLine(lineStart, lineEnd));
782 float num2 = vector2.Distance(vector2.ClosestPointOnLine(lineStart, lineEnd));
783 float num3 = vector3.Distance(vector3.ClosestPointOnLine(lineStart, lineEnd));
784 float num4 = vector4.Distance(vector4.ClosestPointOnLine(lineStart, lineEnd));
785 return MathHelper.Min(num, MathHelper.Min(num2, MathHelper.Min(num3, num4)));
786 }
787
788 // Token: 0x06000F65 RID: 3941 RVA: 0x0040C7D4 File Offset: 0x0040A9D4
789 public static List<List<TextSnippet>> WordwrapStringSmart(string text, Color c, DynamicSpriteFont font, float maxWidth = -1f, int maxLines = -1)
790 {
791 List<List<TextSnippet>> list = new List<List<TextSnippet>>();
792 List<TextSnippet> list2 = new List<TextSnippet>();
793 list.Add(list2);
794 foreach (PositionedSnippet positionedSnippet in ChatManager.LayoutSnippets(font, ChatManager.ParseMessage(text, c), Vector2.One, maxWidth))
795 {
796 while (positionedSnippet.Line >= list.Count)
797 {
798 if (list.Count == maxLines)
799 {
800 return list;
801 }
802 list.Add(list2 = new List<TextSnippet>());
803 }
804 list2.Add(positionedSnippet.Snippet);
805 }
806 return list;
807 }
808
809 // Token: 0x06000F66 RID: 3942 RVA: 0x0040C878 File Offset: 0x0040AA78
810 public static string[] WordwrapString(string text, DynamicSpriteFont font, int maxWidth, int maxLines, out int lineAmount)
811 {
812 string[] array = font.CreateWrappedText(text, (float)maxWidth, Language.ActiveCulture.CultureInfo).Split(new char[] { '\n' });
813 lineAmount = Math.Min(array.Length, maxLines);
814 string[] array2 = new string[maxLines];
815 Array.Copy(array, array2, lineAmount);
816 return array2;
817 }
818
819 // Token: 0x06000F67 RID: 3943 RVA: 0x0040C8C8 File Offset: 0x0040AAC8
820 public static string[] WordwrapStringLegacy(string text, DynamicSpriteFont font, int maxWidth, int maxLines, out int lineAmount)
821 {
822 string[] array = new string[maxLines];
823 int num = 0;
824 List<string> list = new List<string>(text.Split(new char[] { '\n' }));
825 List<string> list2 = new List<string>(list[0].Split(new char[] { ' ' }));
826 int num2 = 1;
827 while (num2 < list.Count && num2 < maxLines)
828 {
829 list2.Add("\n");
830 list2.AddRange(list[num2].Split(new char[] { ' ' }));
831 num2++;
832 }
833 bool flag = true;
834 while (list2.Count > 0)
835 {
836 string text2 = list2[0];
837 string text3 = " ";
838 if (list2.Count == 1)
839 {
840 text3 = "";
841 }
842 if (text2 == "\n")
843 {
844 string[] array2 = array;
845 int num3 = num++;
846 array2[num3] += text2;
847 flag = true;
848 if (num >= maxLines)
849 {
850 break;
851 }
852 list2.RemoveAt(0);
853 }
854 else if (flag)
855 {
856 if (font.MeasureString(text2).X > (float)maxWidth)
857 {
858 string text4 = text2[0].ToString() ?? "";
859 int num4 = 1;
860 while (font.MeasureString(text4 + text2[num4].ToString() + "-").X <= (float)maxWidth)
861 {
862 text4 += text2[num4++].ToString();
863 }
864 text4 += "-";
865 array[num++] = text4 + " ";
866 if (num >= maxLines)
867 {
868 break;
869 }
870 list2.RemoveAt(0);
871 list2.Insert(0, text2.Substring(num4));
872 }
873 else
874 {
875 string[] array3 = array;
876 int num5 = num;
877 array3[num5] = array3[num5] + text2 + text3;
878 flag = false;
879 list2.RemoveAt(0);
880 }
881 }
882 else if (font.MeasureString(array[num] + text2).X > (float)maxWidth)
883 {
884 num++;
885 if (num >= maxLines)
886 {
887 break;
888 }
889 flag = true;
890 }
891 else
892 {
893 string[] array4 = array;
894 int num6 = num;
895 array4[num6] = array4[num6] + text2 + text3;
896 flag = false;
897 list2.RemoveAt(0);
898 }
899 }
900 lineAmount = Math.Min(num + 1, maxLines);
901 return array;
902 }
903
904 // Token: 0x06000F68 RID: 3944 RVA: 0x0040CAFB File Offset: 0x0040ACFB
905 public static Rectangle CenteredRectangle(Vector2 center, Vector2 size)
906 {

908 }

910 // Token: 0x06000F69 RID: 3945 RVA: 0x0040CB38 File Offset: 0x0040AD38

916 // Token: 0x06000F6A RID: 3946 RVA: 0x0040CB6C File Offset: 0x0040AD6C
917 public static Rectangle Including(this Rectangle rect, Point point)
918 {
919 int num = Math.Min(rect.Left, point.X);
920 int num2 = Math.Max(rect.Right, point.X);
921 int num3 = Math.Min(rect.Top, point.Y);
922 int num4 = Math.Max(rect.Bottom, point.Y);
923 return new Rectangle(num, num3, num2 - num, num4 - num3);
924 }
925
926 // Token: 0x06000F6B RID: 3947 RVA: 0x0040CBD4 File Offset: 0x0040ADD4
927 public static Vector2 Vector2FromElipse(Vector2 angleVector, Vector2 elipseSizes)
928 {
929 if (elipseSizes == Vector2.Zero)
930 {
931 return Vector2.Zero;
932 }
933 if (angleVector == Vector2.Zero)
934 {
935 return Vector2.Zero;
936 }
937 angleVector.Normalize();
938 Vector2 vector = Vector2.Normalize(elipseSizes);
939 vector = Vector2.One / vector;
940 angleVector *= vector;
941 angleVector.Normalize();
942 return angleVector * elipseSizes / 2f;
943 }
944
945 // Token: 0x06000F6C RID: 3948 RVA: 0x0040CC42 File Offset: 0x0040AE42
946 public static bool FloatIntersect(float r1StartX, float r1StartY, float r1Width, float r1Height, float r2StartX, float r2StartY, float r2Width, float r2Height)
947 {
948 return r1StartX <= r2StartX + r2Width && r1StartY <= r2StartY + r2Height && r1StartX + r1Width >= r2StartX && r1StartY + r1Height >= r2StartY;
949 }
950
951 // Token: 0x06000F6D RID: 3949 RVA: 0x0040CC42 File Offset: 0x0040AE42
952 public static bool DoubleIntersect(double r1StartX, double r1StartY, double r1Width, double r1Height, double r2StartX, double r2StartY, double r2Width, double r2Height)
953 {
954 return r1StartX <= r2StartX + r2Width && r1StartY <= r2StartY + r2Height && r1StartX + r1Width >= r2StartX && r1StartY + r1Height >= r2StartY;
955 }
956
957 // Token: 0x06000F6E RID: 3950 RVA: 0x0040CC68 File Offset: 0x0040AE68
958 public static bool LineSegmentsIntersect(Vector2D start1, Vector2D end1, Vector2D start2, Vector2D end2)
959 {
960 Vector2D vector2D = end1 - start1;
961 Vector2D vector2D2 = end2 - start2;
962 double num = Vector2D.Cross(vector2D, vector2D2);
963 if (num == 0.0)
964 {
965 return false;
966 }
967 Vector2D vector2D3 = start2 - start1;
968 double num2 = Vector2D.Cross(vector2D3, vector2D) / num;
969 double num3 = Vector2D.Cross(vector2D3, vector2D) / num;
970 double num4 = Vector2D.Cross(vector2D3, vector2D) / num;
971 return 0.0 <= num3 && num3 <= 1.0 && 0.0 <= num4 && num4 <= 1.0;
972 }
973
974 // Token: 0x06000F6F RID: 3951 RVA: 0x0040CCF8 File Offset: 0x0040AEF8
975 public static long CoinsCount(out bool overFlowing, Item[] inv, params int[] ignoreSlots)
976 {
977 List<int> list = new List<int>(ignoreSlots);
978 long num = 0L;
979 for (int i = 0; i < inv.Length; i++)
980 {
981 if (!list.Contains(i))
982 {
983 switch (inv[i].type)
984 {
985 case 71:
986 num += (long)inv[i].stack;
987 break;
988 case 72:
989 num += (long)inv[i].stack * 100L;
990 break;
991 case 73:
992 num += (long)inv[i].stack * 10000L;
993 break;
994 case 74:
995 num += (long)inv[i].stack * 1000000L;
996 break;
997 }
998 }
999 }
1000 overFlowing = false;
1001 return num;
1002 }
1003
1004 // Token: 0x06000F70 RID: 3952 RVA: 0x0040CD98 File Offset: 0x0040AF98
1005 public static int[] CoinsSplit(long count)
1006 {
1007 int[] array = new int[4];
1008 long num = 0L;
1009 long num2 = 1000000L;
1010 for (int i = 3; i >= 0; i--)
1011 {
1012 array[i] = (int)((count - num) / num2);
1013 num += (long)array[i] * num2;
1014 num2 /= 100L;
1015 }
1016 return array;
1017 }
1018
1019 // Token: 0x06000F71 RID: 3953 RVA: 0x0040CDDC File Offset: 0x0040AFDC
1020 public static long CoinsCombineStacks(out bool overFlowing, params long[] coinCounts)
1021 {
1022 long num = 0L;
1023 foreach (long num2 in coinCounts)
1024 {
1025 num += num2;
1026 if (num >= 9999999999L)
1027 {
1028 overFlowing = true;
1029 return 9999999999L;
1030 }
1031 }
1032 overFlowing = false;
1033 return num;
1034 }
1035
1036 // Token: 0x06000F72 RID: 3954 RVA: 0x0040CE24 File Offset: 0x0040B024
1037 public static void PoofOfSmoke(Vector2 position)
1038 {
1039 int num = Main.rand.Next(3, 7);
1040 for (int i = 0; i < num; i++)
1041 {
1042 int num2 = Gore.NewGore(position, (Main.rand.NextFloat() * 6.2831855f).ToRotationVector2() * new Vector2(2f, 0.7f) * 0.7f, Main.rand.Next(11, 14), 1f);
1043 Main.gore[num2].scale = 0.7f;
1044 Main.gore[num2].velocity *= 0.5f;
1045 }
1046 for (int j = 0; j < 10; j++)
1047 {
1048 Dust dust = Main.dust[Dust.NewDust(position, 14, 14, 16, 0f, 0f, 100, default(Color), 1.5f)];
1049 dust.position += new Vector2(5f);
1050 dust.velocity = (Main.rand.NextFloat() * 6.2831855f).ToRotationVector2() * new Vector2(2f, 0.7f) * 0.7f * (0.5f + 0.5f * Main.rand.NextFloat());
1051 }
1052 }
1053

1073 // Token: 0x06000F76 RID: 3958 RVA: 0x0040D02C File Offset: 0x0040B22C
1074 public static void TrimTextIfNeeded(ref string text, DynamicSpriteFont font, float scale, float maxWidth)
1075 {
1076 bool flag = false;
1077 Vector2 vector = font.MeasureString(text) * scale;
1078 while (vector.X > maxWidth)
1079 {
1080 text = Utils.TrimLastCharacter(text);
1081 flag = true;
1082 vector = font.MeasureString(text) * scale;
1083 }
1084 if (flag)
1085 {
1086 text = Utils.TrimLastCharacter(text) + "…";
1087 }
1088 }

1090 // Token: 0x06000F77 RID: 3959 RVA: 0x0040D088 File Offset: 0x0040B288
1091 public static string FormatWith(string original, object obj)
1092 {
1093 PropertyDescriptorCollection properties = TypeDescriptor.GetProperties(obj);
1094 return Utils._substitutionRegex.Replace(original, delegate(Match match)
1095 {
1096 if (match.Groups[1].Length != 0)
1097 {
1098 return "";
1099 }
1100 string text = match.Groups[2].ToString();
1101 PropertyDescriptor propertyDescriptor = properties.Find(text, false);
1102 if (propertyDescriptor == null)
1103 {
1104 return "";
1105 }
1106 return (propertyDescriptor.GetValue(obj) ?? "").ToString();
1107 });
1108 }
1109
1110 // Token: 0x06000F78 RID: 3960 RVA: 0x0040D0D0 File Offset: 0x0040B2D0
1111 public static bool TryCreatingDirectory(string folderPath)
1112 {
1113 if (Directory.Exists(folderPath))
1114 {
1115 return true;
1116 }
1117 bool flag;
1118 try
1119 {
1120 Directory.CreateDirectory(folderPath);
1121 flag = true;
1122 }
1123 catch (Exception ex)
1124 {
1125 FancyErrorPrinter.ShowDirectoryCreationFailError(ex, folderPath);
1126 flag = false;
1127 }
1128 return flag;
1129 }
1130
1131 // Token: 0x06000F79 RID: 3961 RVA: 0x0040D110 File Offset: 0x0040B310
1132 public static void OpenFolder(string folderPath)
1133 {
1134 if (!Utils.TryCreatingDirectory(folderPath))
1135 {
1136 return;
1137 }
1138 if (Platform.IsLinux)
1139 {
1140 Process.Start(new ProcessStartInfo(folderPath)
1141 {
1142 FileName = "open-folder",
1143 Arguments = folderPath,
1144 UseShellExecute = true,
1145 CreateNoWindow = true
1146 });
1147 return;
1148 }
1149 Process.Start(folderPath);
1150 }
1151

1315 {

1317 {
1318 return Rectangle.Empty;
1319 }

1341 // Token: 0x06000F94 RID: 3988 RVA: 0x0040D478 File Offset: 0x0040B678
1342 public static Rectangle Frame(this Texture2D tex, int horizontalFrames = 1, int verticalFrames = 1, int frameX = 0, int frameY = 0, int sizeOffsetX = 0, int sizeOffsetY = 0)
1343 {
1344 int num = tex.Width / horizontalFrames;
1345 int num2 = tex.Height / verticalFrames;
1346 return new Rectangle(num * frameX, num2 * frameY, num + sizeOffsetX, num2 + sizeOffsetY);
1347 }
1348
1349 // Token: 0x06000F95 RID: 3989 RVA: 0x0040D4AB File Offset: 0x0040B6AB
1350 public static Vector2 OriginFlip(this Rectangle rect, Vector2 origin, SpriteEffects effects)
1351 {
1352 if ((effects & SpriteEffects.FlipHorizontally) != SpriteEffects.None)
1353 {
1354 origin.X = (float)rect.Width - origin.X;
1355 }
1356 if ((effects & SpriteEffects.FlipVertically) != SpriteEffects.None)
1357 {
1358 origin.Y = (float)rect.Height - origin.Y;
1359 }
1360 return origin;
1361 }
1362

1403 // Token: 0x06000F9C RID: 3996 RVA: 0x0040D598 File Offset: 0x0040B798
1404 public static Vector2 ReadPackedVector2(this BinaryReader bb)

1411 // Token: 0x06000F9D RID: 3997 RVA: 0x0040D5C4 File Offset: 0x0040B7C4
1412 public static void Write7BitEncodedInt(this BinaryWriter writer, int value)
1413 {
1414 uint num;
1415 for (num = (uint)value; num > 127U; num >>= 7)
1416 {
1417 writer.Write((byte)(num | 4294967168U));
1418 }
1419 writer.Write((byte)num);
1420 }
1421
1422 // Token: 0x06000F9E RID: 3998 RVA: 0x0040D5F4 File Offset: 0x0040B7F4
1423 public static int Read7BitEncodedInt(this BinaryReader reader)
1424 {
1425 uint num = 0U;
1426 byte b;
1427 for (int i = 0; i < 28; i += 7)
1428 {
1429 b = reader.ReadByte();
1430 num |= (uint)((uint)(b & 127) << i);
1431 if (b <= 127)
1432 {
1433 return (int)num;
1434 }
1435 }
1436 b = reader.ReadByte();
1437 if (b > 15)
1438 {
1439 throw new FormatException("Bad 7bit encoded int");
1440 }
1441 return (int)(num | (uint)((uint)b << 28));
1442 }
1443

1528 // Token: 0x06000FAD RID: 4013 RVA: 0x0040D7EC File Offset: 0x0040B9EC
1529 public static float Distance(this Rectangle r, Vector2 point)
1530 {
1531 if (Utils.FloatIntersect((float)r.Left, (float)r.Top, (float)r.Width, (float)r.Height, point.X, point.Y, 0f, 0f))
1532 {
1533 return 0f;
1534 }
1535 if (point.X >= (float)r.Left && point.X <= (float)r.Right)
1536 {
1537 if (point.Y < (float)r.Top)
1538 {
1539 return (float)r.Top - point.Y;
1540 }
1541 return point.Y - (float)r.Bottom;
1542 }
1543 else if (point.Y >= (float)r.Top && point.Y <= (float)r.Bottom)
1544 {
1545 if (point.X < (float)r.Left)
1546 {
1547 return (float)r.Left - point.X;
1548 }
1549 return point.X - (float)r.Right;
1550 }
1551 else if (point.X < (float)r.Left)
1552 {
1553 if (point.Y < (float)r.Top)
1554 {
1555 return Vector2.Distance(point, r.TopLeft());
1556 }
1557 return Vector2.Distance(point, r.BottomLeft());
1558 }
1559 else
1560 {
1561 if (point.Y < (float)r.Top)
1562 {
1563 return Vector2.Distance(point, r.TopRight());
1564 }
1565 return Vector2.Distance(point, r.BottomRight());
1566 }
1567 }
1568
1569 // Token: 0x06000FAE RID: 4014 RVA: 0x0040D940 File Offset: 0x0040BB40
1570 public static double Distance(this Rectangle r, Vector2D point)
1571 {
1572 if (Utils.DoubleIntersect((double)r.Left, (double)r.Top, (double)r.Width, (double)r.Height, point.X, point.Y, 0.0, 0.0))
1573 {
1574 return 0.0;
1575 }
1576 if (point.X >= (double)r.Left && point.X <= (double)r.Right)
1577 {
1578 if (point.Y < (double)r.Top)
1579 {
1580 return (double)r.Top - point.Y;
1581 }
1582 return point.Y - (double)r.Bottom;
1583 }
1584 else if (point.Y >= (double)r.Top && point.Y <= (double)r.Bottom)
1585 {
1586 if (point.X < (double)r.Left)
1587 {
1588 return (double)r.Left - point.X;
1589 }
1590 return point.X - (double)r.Right;
1591 }
1592 else if (point.X < (double)r.Left)
1593 {
1594 if (point.Y < (double)r.Top)
1595 {
1596 return Vector2D.Distance(point, r.TopLeftDouble());
1597 }
1598 return Vector2D.Distance(point, r.BottomLeftDouble());
1599 }
1600 else
1601 {
1602 if (point.Y < (double)r.Top)
1603 {
1604 return Vector2D.Distance(point, r.TopRightDouble());
1605 }
1606 return Vector2D.Distance(point, r.BottomRightDouble());
1607 }
1608 }
1609
1610 // Token: 0x06000FAF RID: 4015 RVA: 0x0040DAA0 File Offset: 0x0040BCA0
1611 public static Vector2 ClosestPointInRect(this Rectangle r, Vector2 point)
1612 {
1613 Vector2 vector = point;
1614 if (vector.X < (float)r.Left)
1615 {
1616 vector.X = (float)r.Left;
1617 }
1618 if (vector.X > (float)r.Right)
1619 {
1620 vector.X = (float)r.Right;
1621 }
1622 if (vector.Y < (float)r.Top)
1623 {
1624 vector.Y = (float)r.Top;
1625 }
1626 if (vector.Y > (float)r.Bottom)
1627 {
1628 vector.Y = (float)r.Bottom;
1629 }
1630 return vector;
1631 }
1632
1633 // Token: 0x06000FB0 RID: 4016 RVA: 0x0040DB2C File Offset: 0x0040BD2C
1634 public static Rectangle Modified(this Rectangle r, int x, int y, int w, int h)
1635 {
1636 return new Rectangle(r.X + x, r.Y + y, r.Width + w, r.Height + h);
1637 }
1638
1639 // Token: 0x06000FB1 RID: 4017 RVA: 0x0040DB54 File Offset: 0x0040BD54
1640 public static bool IntersectsConeFastInaccurate(this Rectangle targetRect, Vector2 coneCenter, float coneLength, float coneRotation, float maximumAngle)
1641 {
1642 Vector2 vector = coneCenter + coneRotation.ToRotationVector2() * coneLength;
1643 Vector2 vector2 = targetRect.ClosestPointInRect(vector) - coneCenter;
1644 float num = vector2.RotatedBy((double)(-(double)coneRotation), default(Vector2)).ToRotation();
1645 return num >= -maximumAngle && num <= maximumAngle && vector2.Length() < coneLength;
1646 }
1647
1648 // Token: 0x06000FB2 RID: 4018 RVA: 0x0040DBB4 File Offset: 0x0040BDB4
1649 public static bool IntersectsConeSlowMoreAccurate(this Rectangle targetRect, Vector2 coneCenter, float coneLength, float coneRotation, float maximumAngle)
1650 {
1651 Vector2 vector = coneCenter + coneRotation.ToRotationVector2() * coneLength;
1652 return Utils.DoesFitInCone(targetRect.ClosestPointInRect(vector), coneCenter, coneLength, coneRotation, maximumAngle) || Utils.DoesFitInCone(targetRect.TopLeft(), coneCenter, coneLength, coneRotation, maximumAngle) || Utils.DoesFitInCone(targetRect.TopRight(), coneCenter, coneLength, coneRotation, maximumAngle) || Utils.DoesFitInCone(targetRect.BottomLeft(), coneCenter, coneLength, coneRotation, maximumAngle) || Utils.DoesFitInCone(targetRect.BottomRight(), coneCenter, coneLength, coneRotation, maximumAngle);
1653 }
1654
1655 // Token: 0x06000FB3 RID: 4019 RVA: 0x0040DC3C File Offset: 0x0040BE3C
1656 public static bool DoesFitInCone(Vector2 point, Vector2 coneCenter, float coneLength, float coneRotation, float maximumAngle)
1657 {
1658 Vector2 vector = point - coneCenter;
1659 float num = vector.RotatedBy((double)(-(double)coneRotation), default(Vector2)).ToRotation();
1660 return num >= -maximumAngle && num <= maximumAngle && vector.Length() < coneLength;
1661 }
1662
1663 // Token: 0x06000FB4 RID: 4020 RVA: 0x0040DC80 File Offset: 0x0040BE80
1664 public static float ToRotation(this Vector2 v)
1665 {
1666 return (float)Math.Atan2((double)v.Y, (double)v.X);
1667 }
1668
1669 // Token: 0x06000FB5 RID: 4021 RVA: 0x0040DC96 File Offset: 0x0040BE96
1670 public static double ToRotation(this Vector2D v)
1671 {
1672 return Math.Atan2(v.Y, v.X);
1673 }
1674
1675 // Token: 0x06000FB6 RID: 4022 RVA: 0x0040DCA9 File Offset: 0x0040BEA9
1676 public static Vector2 ToRotationVector2(this float f)
1677 {
1678 return new Vector2((float)Math.Cos((double)f), (float)Math.Sin((double)f));
1679 }
1680
1681 // Token: 0x06000FB7 RID: 4023 RVA: 0x0040DCC0 File Offset: 0x0040BEC0
1682 public static Vector2D ToRotationVector2D(this double f)
1683 {
1684 return new Vector2D(Math.Cos(f), Math.Sin(f));
1685 }
1686
1687 // Token: 0x06000FB8 RID: 4024 RVA: 0x0040DCD4 File Offset: 0x0040BED4
1688 public static Vector2 RotatedBy(this Vector2 spinningpoint, double radians, Vector2 center = default(Vector2))
1689 {
1690 float num = (float)Math.Cos(radians);
1691 float num2 = (float)Math.Sin(radians);
1692 Vector2 vector = spinningpoint - center;
1693 Vector2 vector2 = center;
1694 vector2.X += vector.X * num - vector.Y * num2;
1695 vector2.Y += vector.X * num2 + vector.Y * num;
1696 return vector2;
1697 }
1698
1699 // Token: 0x06000FB9 RID: 4025 RVA: 0x0040DD34 File Offset: 0x0040BF34
1700 public static Vector2D RotatedBy(this Vector2D spinningpoint, double radians, Vector2D center = default(Vector2D))
1701 {
1702 double num = Math.Cos(radians);
1703 double num2 = Math.Sin(radians);
1704 Vector2D vector2D = spinningpoint - center;
1705 Vector2D vector2D2 = center;
1706 vector2D2.X += vector2D.X * num - vector2D.Y * num2;
1707 vector2D2.Y += vector2D.X * num2 + vector2D.Y * num;
1708 return vector2D2;
1709 }
1710
1711 // Token: 0x06000FBA RID: 4026 RVA: 0x0040DD94 File Offset: 0x0040BF94
1712 public static Vector2 RotatedByRandom(this Vector2 spinninpoint, double maxRadians)
1713 {
1714 return spinninpoint.RotatedBy(Main.rand.NextDouble() * maxRadians - Main.rand.NextDouble() * maxRadians, default(Vector2));
1715 }
1716
1717 // Token: 0x06000FBB RID: 4027 RVA: 0x0040DDC9 File Offset: 0x0040BFC9
1718 public static Vector2 Floor(this Vector2 vec)
1719 {
1720 vec.X = (float)((int)vec.X);
1721 vec.Y = (float)((int)vec.Y);
1722 return vec;
1723 }
1724
1725 // Token: 0x06000FBC RID: 4028 RVA: 0x0040DDEA File Offset: 0x0040BFEA
1726 public static bool HasNaNs(this Vector2 vec)
1727 {
1728 return float.IsNaN(vec.X) || float.IsNaN(vec.Y);
1729 }
1730
1731 // Token: 0x06000FBD RID: 4029 RVA: 0x0040DE06 File Offset: 0x0040C006
1732 public static bool Between(this Vector2 vec, Vector2 minimum, Vector2 maximum)
1733 {
1734 return vec.X >= minimum.X && vec.X <= maximum.X && vec.Y >= minimum.Y && vec.Y <= maximum.Y;
1735 }
1736
1737 // Token: 0x06000FBE RID: 4030 RVA: 0x0040DE45 File Offset: 0x0040C045
1738 public static Vector2 ScaledBy(this Vector2 vec, Vector2 other)
1739 {

1741 }
1742
1743 // Token: 0x06000FBF RID: 4031 RVA: 0x0040DE4E File Offset: 0x0040C04E
1744 public static Vector2 ScaledBy(this Vector2 vec, float scaleX, float scaleY)
1745 {
1746 return Vector2.Multiply(vec, new Vector2(scaleX, scaleY));
1747 }

1791 // Token: 0x06000FC7 RID: 4039 RVA: 0x0040DF08 File Offset: 0x0040C108
1792 public static Vector2 MoveTowards(this Vector2 currentPosition, Vector2 targetPosition, float maxAmountAllowedToMove)
1793 {
1794 Vector2 vector = targetPosition - currentPosition;
1795 if (vector.Length() < maxAmountAllowedToMove)
1796 {
1797 return targetPosition;
1798 }
1799 return currentPosition + vector.SafeNormalize(Vector2.Zero) * maxAmountAllowedToMove;
1800 }
1801
1802 // Token: 0x06000FC8 RID: 4040 RVA: 0x0040DF40 File Offset: 0x0040C140
1803 public static float MoveTowards(float original, float target, float amount)
1804 {
1805 if (original == target)
1806 {
1807 return target;
1808 }
1809 int num = Math.Sign(target - original);
1810 float num2 = original + amount * (float)num;
1811 if (Math.Sign(target - num2) != num)
1812 {
1813 return target;
1814 }
1815 return num2;
1816 }
1817

1868 {

1870 {

1892 // Token: 0x06000FD4 RID: 4052 RVA: 0x0040E090 File Offset: 0x0040C290
1893 public static Vector2 ClosestPointOnLine(this Vector2 P, Vector2 A, Vector2 B)
1894 {
1895 Vector2 vector = P - A;
1896 Vector2 vector2 = B - A;
1897 float num = vector2.LengthSquared();
1898 float num2 = Vector2.Dot(vector, vector2) / num;
1899 if (num2 < 0f)
1900 {
1901 return A;
1902 }
1903 if (num2 > 1f)
1904 {
1905 return B;
1906 }
1907 return A + vector2 * num2;
1908 }
1909
1910 // Token: 0x06000FD5 RID: 4053 RVA: 0x0040E0E0 File Offset: 0x0040C2E0
1911 public static Vector2D ClosestPointOnLine(this Vector2D P, Vector2D A, Vector2D B)
1912 {
1913 Vector2D vector2D = P - A;
1914 Vector2D vector2D2 = B - A;
1915 double num = vector2D2.LengthSquared();
1916 double num2 = Vector2D.Dot(vector2D, vector2D2) / num;
1917 if (num2 < 0.0)
1918 {
1919 return A;
1920 }
1921 if (num2 > 1.0)
1922 {
1923 return B;
1924 }
1925 return A + vector2D2 * num2;
1926 }
1927
1928 // Token: 0x06000FD6 RID: 4054 RVA: 0x0040E138 File Offset: 0x0040C338
1929 public static bool RectangleLineCollision(Vector2 rectTopLeft, Vector2 rectBottomRight, Vector2 lineStart, Vector2 lineEnd)
1930 {
1931 if (lineStart.Between(rectTopLeft, rectBottomRight) || lineEnd.Between(rectTopLeft, rectBottomRight))
1932 {
1933 return true;
1934 }
1935 Vector2 vector = new Vector2(rectBottomRight.X, rectTopLeft.Y);
1936 Vector2 vector2 = new Vector2(rectTopLeft.X, rectBottomRight.Y);
1937 Vector2[] array = new Vector2[]
1938 {
1939 rectTopLeft.ClosestPointOnLine(lineStart, lineEnd),
1940 vector.ClosestPointOnLine(lineStart, lineEnd),
1941 vector2.ClosestPointOnLine(lineStart, lineEnd),
1942 rectBottomRight.ClosestPointOnLine(lineStart, lineEnd)
1943 };
1944 for (int i = 0; i < array.Length; i++)
1945 {
1946 if (array[0].Between(rectTopLeft, vector2))
1947 {
1948 return true;
1949 }
1950 }
1951 return false;
1952 }
1953

2090 // Token: 0x06000FEC RID: 4076 RVA: 0x0040E4DC File Offset: 0x0040C6DC
2091 public static float AngleLerp(this float curAngle, float targetAngle, float amount)
2092 {
2093 float num2;
2094 if (targetAngle < curAngle)
2095 {
2096 float num = targetAngle + 6.2831855f;
2097 num2 = ((num - curAngle > curAngle - targetAngle) ? MathHelper.Lerp(curAngle, targetAngle, amount) : MathHelper.Lerp(curAngle, num, amount));
2098 }
2099 else
2100 {
2101 if (targetAngle <= curAngle)
2102 {
2103 return curAngle;
2104 }
2105 float num = targetAngle - 6.2831855f;
2106 num2 = ((targetAngle - curAngle > curAngle - num) ? MathHelper.Lerp(curAngle, num, amount) : MathHelper.Lerp(curAngle, targetAngle, amount));
2107 }
2108 return MathHelper.WrapAngle(num2);
2109 }
2110
2111 // Token: 0x06000FED RID: 4077 RVA: 0x0040E544 File Offset: 0x0040C744
2112 public static float AngleTowards(this float curAngle, float targetAngle, float maxChange)
2113 {
2114 curAngle = MathHelper.WrapAngle(curAngle);
2115 targetAngle = MathHelper.WrapAngle(targetAngle);
2116 if (curAngle < targetAngle)
2117 {
2118 if (targetAngle - curAngle > 3.1415927f)
2119 {
2120 curAngle += 6.2831855f;
2121 }
2122 }
2123 else if (curAngle - targetAngle > 3.1415927f)
2124 {
2125 curAngle -= 6.2831855f;
2126 }
2127 curAngle += MathHelper.Clamp(targetAngle - curAngle, -maxChange, maxChange);
2128 return MathHelper.WrapAngle(curAngle);
2129 }
2130
2131 // Token: 0x06000FEE RID: 4078 RVA: 0x0040E5A4 File Offset: 0x0040C7A4
2132 public static float RotateUntil(this float curAngle, float targetAngle, float changePerTick)
2133 {
2134 curAngle = MathHelper.WrapAngle(curAngle);
2135 targetAngle = MathHelper.WrapAngle(targetAngle);
2136 if (curAngle < targetAngle)
2137 {
2138 if (targetAngle - curAngle > 3.1415927f)
2139 {
2140 curAngle += 6.2831855f;
2141 }
2142 }
2143 else if (curAngle - targetAngle > 3.1415927f)
2144 {
2145 curAngle -= 6.2831855f;
2146 }
2147 curAngle += changePerTick;
2148 curAngle = MathHelper.WrapAngle(curAngle);
2149 if (curAngle > targetAngle)
2150 {
2151 curAngle = targetAngle;
2152 }
2153 return curAngle;
2154 }

2158 {
2159 if (firstArray == null && secondArray == null)
2160 {
2161 return true;
2162 }
2163 if (firstArray == null || secondArray == null)
2164 {
2165 return false;
2166 }
2167 if (firstArray.Length != secondArray.Length)
2168 {
2169 return false;
2170 }
2171 for (int i = 0; i < firstArray.Length; i++)
2172 {
2173 if (firstArray[i] != secondArray[i])
2174 {
2175 return false;
2176 }
2177 }
2178 return true;
2179 }

2185 {
2186 return true;
2187 }
2188 if (firstArray == null || secondArray == null)
2189 {
2190 return false;
2191 }
2192 if (firstArray.Length != secondArray.Length)
2193 {
2194 return false;
2195 }
2196 if (firstArray.GetLength(0) != secondArray.GetLength(0))
2197 {
2198 return false;
2199 }
2200 if (firstArray.GetLength(1) != secondArray.GetLength(1))
2201 {
2202 return false;
2203 }
2204 for (int i = 0; i < firstArray.GetLength(0); i++)
2205 {
2206 for (int j = 0; j < firstArray.GetLength(1); j++)
2207 {
2208 if (firstArray[i, j] != secondArray[i, j])
2209 {
2210 return false;
2211 }
2212 }
2213 }
2214 return true;

2224 {

2231 // Token: 0x06000FF2 RID: 4082 RVA: 0x0040E704 File Offset: 0x0040C904
2232 public static List<int> GetTrueIndexes(params bool[][] arrays)
2233 {
2234 List<int> list = new List<int>();
2235 foreach (bool[] array in arrays)
2236 {
2237 list.AddRange(array.GetTrueIndexes());
2238 }
2239 return list.Distinct<int>().ToList<int>();
2240 }

2246 foreach (T t in arr)
2247 {
2248 if (EqualityComparer<T>.Default.Equals(t, value))
2249 {
2250 num++;
2251 }
2252 }
2253 return num;
2254 }

2289 }
2290
2291 // Token: 0x06000FF9 RID: 4089 RVA: 0x0040E832 File Offset: 0x0040CA32
2292 public static bool PlotLine(Point p0, Point p1, Utils.TileActionAttempt plot, bool jump = true)
2293 {
2294 return Utils.PlotLine(p0.X, p0.Y, p1.X, p1.Y, plot, jump);
2295 }
2296
2297 // Token: 0x06000FFA RID: 4090 RVA: 0x0040E854 File Offset: 0x0040CA54
2298 private static bool PlotLine(int x0, int y0, int x1, int y1, Utils.TileActionAttempt plot, bool jump = true)
2299 {
2300 if (x0 == x1 && y0 == y1)
2301 {
2302 return plot(x0, y0);
2303 }
2304 bool flag = Math.Abs(y1 - y0) > Math.Abs(x1 - x0);
2305 if (flag)
2306 {
2307 Utils.Swap<int>(ref x0, ref y0);
2308 Utils.Swap<int>(ref x1, ref y1);
2309 }
2310 int num = Math.Abs(x1 - x0);
2311 int num2 = Math.Abs(y1 - y0);
2312 int num3 = num / 2;
2313 int num4 = y0;
2314 int num5 = ((x0 < x1) ? 1 : (-1));
2315 int num6 = ((y0 < y1) ? 1 : (-1));
2316 for (int num7 = x0; num7 != x1; num7 += num5)
2317 {
2318 if (flag)
2319 {
2320 if (!plot(num4, num7))
2321 {
2322 return false;
2323 }
2324 }
2325 else if (!plot(num7, num4))
2326 {
2327 return false;
2328 }
2329 num3 -= num2;
2330 if (num3 < 0)
2331 {
2332 num4 += num6;
2333 if (!jump)
2334 {
2335 if (flag)
2336 {
2337 if (!plot(num4, num7))
2338 {
2339 return false;
2340 }
2341 }
2342 else if (!plot(num7, num4))
2343 {
2344 return false;
2345 }
2346 }
2347 num3 += num;
2348 }
2349 }
2350 return true;
2351 }
2352
2353 // Token: 0x06000FFB RID: 4091 RVA: 0x0040E933 File Offset: 0x0040CB33
2354 public static int RandomNext(ref ulong seed, int bits)
2355 {
2356 seed = Utils.RandomNextSeed(seed);
2357 return (int)(seed >> 48 - bits);
2358 }
2359
2360 // Token: 0x06000FFC RID: 4092 RVA: 0x0040E949 File Offset: 0x0040CB49
2361 public static ulong RandomNextSeed(ulong seed)
2362 {
2363 return (seed * 25214903917UL + 11UL) & 281474976710655UL;
2364 }
2365
2366 // Token: 0x06000FFD RID: 4093 RVA: 0x0040E964 File Offset: 0x0040CB64
2367 public static float RandomFloat(ref ulong seed)
2368 {
2369 return (float)Utils.RandomNext(ref seed, 24) / 16777216f;
2370 }
2371
2372 // Token: 0x06000FFE RID: 4094 RVA: 0x0040E978 File Offset: 0x0040CB78
2373 public static int RandomInt(ref ulong seed, int max)
2374 {
2375 if ((max & -max) == max)
2376 {
2377 return (int)((long)max * (long)Utils.RandomNext(ref seed, 31) >> 31);
2378 }
2379 int num;
2380 int num2;
2381 do
2382 {
2383 num = Utils.RandomNext(ref seed, 31);
2384 num2 = num % max;
2385 }
2386 while (num - num2 + (max - 1) < 0);
2387 return num2;
2388 }
2389
2390 // Token: 0x06000FFF RID: 4095 RVA: 0x0040E9B5 File Offset: 0x0040CBB5
2391 public static int RandomInt(ref ulong seed, int min, int max)
2392 {
2393 return Utils.RandomInt(ref seed, max - min) + min;

2396 // Token: 0x06001000 RID: 4096 RVA: 0x0040E9C2 File Offset: 0x0040CBC2
2397 public static bool PlotTileLine(Vector2 start, Vector2 end, float width, Utils.TileActionAttempt plot)
2398 {

2400 }
2401
2402 // Token: 0x06001001 RID: 4097 RVA: 0x0040E9D8 File Offset: 0x0040CBD8
2403 public static bool PlotTileLine(Vector2D start, Vector2D end, double width, Utils.TileActionAttempt plot)
2404 {
2405 double num = width / 2.0;
2406 Vector2D vector2D = end - start;
2407 Vector2D vector2D2 = vector2D / vector2D.Length();
2408 Vector2D vector2D3 = new Vector2D(-vector2D2.Y, vector2D2.X) * num;
2409 Point point = (start - vector2D3).ToTileCoordinates();
2410 Point point2 = (start + vector2D3).ToTileCoordinates();
2411 Point point3 = start.ToTileCoordinates();
2412 Point point4 = end.ToTileCoordinates();
2413 Point lineMinOffset = new Point(point.X - point3.X, point.Y - point3.Y);
2414 Point lineMaxOffset = new Point(point2.X - point3.X, point2.Y - point3.Y);
2415 return Utils.PlotLine(point3.X, point3.Y, point4.X, point4.Y, (int x, int y) => Utils.PlotLine(x + lineMinOffset.X, y + lineMinOffset.Y, x + lineMaxOffset.X, y + lineMaxOffset.Y, plot, false), true);
2416 }
2417
2418 // Token: 0x06001002 RID: 4098 RVA: 0x0040EADC File Offset: 0x0040CCDC
2419 public static bool PlotTileTale(Vector2D start, Vector2D end, double width, Utils.TileActionAttempt plot)
2420 {
2421 double halfWidth = width / 2.0;
2422 Vector2D vector2D = end - start;
2423 Vector2D vector2D2 = vector2D / vector2D.Length();
2424 Vector2D perpOffset = new Vector2D(-vector2D2.Y, vector2D2.X);
2425 Point pointStart = start.ToTileCoordinates();
2426 Point point = end.ToTileCoordinates();
2427 int length = 0;
2428 Utils.PlotLine(pointStart.X, pointStart.Y, point.X, point.Y, delegate
2429 {
2430 int length2 = length;
2431 length = length2 + 1;
2432 return true;
2433 }, true);
2434 int length3 = length;
2435 length = length3 - 1;
2436 int curLength = 0;
2437 return Utils.PlotLine(pointStart.X, pointStart.Y, point.X, point.Y, delegate(int x, int y)
2438 {
2439 double num = 1.0 - (double)curLength / (double)length;
2440 int curLength2 = curLength;
2441 curLength = curLength2 + 1;
2442 Point point2 = (start - perpOffset * halfWidth * num).ToTileCoordinates();
2443 Point point3 = (start + perpOffset * halfWidth * num).ToTileCoordinates();
2444 Point point4 = new Point(point2.X - pointStart.X, point2.Y - pointStart.Y);
2445 Point point5 = new Point(point3.X - pointStart.X, point3.Y - pointStart.Y);
2446 return Utils.PlotLine(x + point4.X, y + point4.Y, x + point5.X, y + point5.Y, plot, false);
2447 }, true);
2448 }
2449
2450 // Token: 0x06001003 RID: 4099 RVA: 0x0040EBE4 File Offset: 0x0040CDE4
2451 public static void FloodFillTile(Point point, float maxDist, Utils.TileActionAttempt plot)
2452 {
2453 if (!WorldGen.InWorld(point, 0))
2454 {
2455 return;
2456 }
2457 List<Point> floodFillQueue = Utils._floodFillQueue1;
2458 List<Point> floodFillQueue2 = Utils._floodFillQueue2;
2459 BitSet2D floodFillBitset = Utils._floodFillBitset;
2460 floodFillBitset.Reset(point, (int)Math.Ceiling((double)maxDist) + 1);
2461 floodFillQueue2.Add(point);
2462 floodFillBitset.Add(point);
2463 while (floodFillQueue2.Count > 0)
2464 {
2465 Utils.Swap<List<Point>>(ref floodFillQueue, ref floodFillQueue2);
2466 floodFillQueue2.Clear();
2467 foreach (Point point2 in floodFillQueue)
2468 {
2469 if (plot(point2.X, point2.Y))
2470 {
2471 Point point3 = new Point(point2.X - 1, point2.Y);
2472 if (WorldGen.InWorld(point3, 0) && floodFillBitset.Add(point3))
2473 {
2474 floodFillQueue2.Add(point3);
2475 }
2476 point3 = new Point(point2.X + 1, point2.Y);
2477 if (WorldGen.InWorld(point3, 0) && floodFillBitset.Add(point3))
2478 {
2479 floodFillQueue2.Add(point3);
2480 }
2481 point3 = new Point(point2.X, point2.Y - 1);
2482 if (WorldGen.InWorld(point3, 0) && floodFillBitset.Add(point3))
2483 {
2484 floodFillQueue2.Add(point3);
2485 }
2486 point3 = new Point(point2.X, point2.Y + 1);
2487 if (WorldGen.InWorld(point3, 0) && floodFillBitset.Add(point3))
2488 {
2489 floodFillQueue2.Add(point3);
2490 }
2491 }
2492 }
2493 }
2494 }
2495

2497 public static int RandomConsecutive(double random, int odds)
2498 {

2500 }

2532 // Token: 0x0600100A RID: 4106 RVA: 0x0040EDD0 File Offset: 0x0040CFD0
2533 public static void DrawBorderStringFourWay(SpriteBatch sb, DynamicSpriteFont font, string text, float x, float y, Color textColor, Color borderColor, Vector2 origin, float scale = 1f)
2534 {
2535 Color color = borderColor;
2536 Vector2 zero = Vector2.Zero;
2537 int i = 0;
2538 while (i < 5)
2539 {
2540 switch (i)
2541 {
2542 case 0:
2543 zero.X = x - 2f;
2544 zero.Y = y;
2545 break;
2546 case 1:
2547 zero.X = x + 2f;
2548 zero.Y = y;
2549 break;
2550 case 2:
2551 zero.X = x;
2552 zero.Y = y - 2f;
2553 break;
2554 case 3:
2555 zero.X = x;
2556 zero.Y = y + 2f;
2557 break;
2558 case 4:
2559 goto IL_0090;
2560 default:
2561 goto IL_0090;
2562 }
2563 IL_00A4:
2564 DynamicSpriteFontExtensionMethods.DrawString(sb, font, text, zero, color, 0f, origin, scale, SpriteEffects.None, 0f, null, null);
2565 i++;
2566 continue;
2567 IL_0090:
2568 zero.X = x;
2569 zero.Y = y;
2570 color = textColor;
2571 goto IL_00A4;
2572 }
2573 }
2574
2575 // Token: 0x0600100B RID: 4107 RVA: 0x0040EEA8 File Offset: 0x0040D0A8
2576 public static Vector2 DrawBorderString(SpriteBatch sb, string text, Vector2 pos, Color color, float scale = 1f, float anchorx = 0f, float anchory = 0f, int maxCharactersDisplayed = -1)
2577 {
2578 if (maxCharactersDisplayed != -1)
2579 {
2580 text = Utils.TrimUserString(text, maxCharactersDisplayed);
2581 }
2582 DynamicSpriteFont value = FontAssets.MouseText.Value;
2583 Vector2 vector = value.MeasureString(text);
2584 ChatManager.DrawColorCodedStringWithShadow(sb, value, text, pos, color, 0f, new Vector2(anchorx, anchory) * vector, new Vector2(scale), -1f, 1.5f);
2585 return vector * scale;
2586 }
2587
2588 // Token: 0x0600100C RID: 4108 RVA: 0x0040EF10 File Offset: 0x0040D110
2589 public static Vector2 DrawBorderStringBig(SpriteBatch spriteBatch, string text, Vector2 pos, Color color, float scale = 1f, float anchorx = 0f, float anchory = 0f, int maxCharactersDisplayed = -1)
2590 {
2591 if (maxCharactersDisplayed != -1 && text.Length > maxCharactersDisplayed)
2592 {
2593 text.Substring(0, maxCharactersDisplayed);
2594 }
2595 DynamicSpriteFont value = FontAssets.DeathText.Value;
2596 for (int i = -1; i < 2; i++)
2597 {
2598 for (int j = -1; j < 2; j++)
2599 {
2600 DynamicSpriteFontExtensionMethods.DrawString(spriteBatch, value, text, pos + new Vector2((float)i, (float)j), Color.Black, 0f, new Vector2(anchorx, anchory) * value.MeasureString(text), scale, SpriteEffects.None, 0f, null, null);
2601 }
2602 }
2603 DynamicSpriteFontExtensionMethods.DrawString(spriteBatch, value, text, pos, color, 0f, new Vector2(anchorx, anchory) * value.MeasureString(text), scale, SpriteEffects.None, 0f, null, null);
2604 return value.MeasureString(text) * scale;
2605 }

2619 // Token: 0x0600100F RID: 4111 RVA: 0x0040F00C File Offset: 0x0040D20C
2620 public static void DrawInvBG(SpriteBatch sb, int x, int y, int w, int h, Color c = default(Color))
2621 {
2622 if (c == default(Color))
2623 {
2624 c = new Color(63, 65, 151, 255) * 0.785f;
2625 }
2626 Texture2D value = TextureAssets.InventoryBack13.Value;
2627 if (w < 20)
2628 {
2629 w = 20;
2630 }
2631 if (h < 20)
2632 {
2633 h = 20;
2634 }
2635 sb.Draw(value, new Rectangle(x, y, 10, 10), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(0, 0, 10, 10)), c);
2636 sb.Draw(value, new Rectangle(x + 10, y, w - 20, 10), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(10, 0, 10, 10)), c);
2637 sb.Draw(value, new Rectangle(x + w - 10, y, 10, 10), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(value.Width - 10, 0, 10, 10)), c);
2638 sb.Draw(value, new Rectangle(x, y + 10, 10, h - 20), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(0, 10, 10, 10)), c);
2639 sb.Draw(value, new Rectangle(x + 10, y + 10, w - 20, h - 20), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(10, 10, 10, 10)), c);
2640 sb.Draw(value, new Rectangle(x + w - 10, y + 10, 10, h - 20), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(value.Width - 10, 10, 10, 10)), c);
2641 sb.Draw(value, new Rectangle(x, y + h - 10, 10, 10), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(0, value.Height - 10, 10, 10)), c);
2642 sb.Draw(value, new Rectangle(x + 10, y + h - 10, w - 20, 10), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(10, value.Height - 10, 10, 10)), c);
2643 sb.Draw(value, new Rectangle(x + w - 10, y + h - 10, 10, 10), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(value.Width - 10, value.Height - 10, 10, 10)), c);
2644 }

2651 {
2652 using (StreamReader streamReader = new StreamReader(manifestResourceStream))
2653 {
2654 text = streamReader.ReadToEnd();

2657 return text;

2660 // Token: 0x06001011 RID: 4113 RVA: 0x0040F280 File Offset: 0x0040D480
2661 public static void DrawSplicedPanel(SpriteBatch sb, Texture2D texture, int x, int y, int w, int h, int leftEnd, int rightEnd, int topEnd, int bottomEnd, Color c)
2662 {
2663 if (w < leftEnd + rightEnd)
2664 {
2665 w = leftEnd + rightEnd;
2666 }
2667 if (h < topEnd + bottomEnd)
2668 {
2669 h = topEnd + bottomEnd;
2670 }
2671 sb.Draw(texture, new Rectangle(x, y, leftEnd, topEnd), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(0, 0, leftEnd, topEnd)), c);
2672 sb.Draw(texture, new Rectangle(x + leftEnd, y, w - leftEnd - rightEnd, topEnd), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(leftEnd, 0, texture.Width - leftEnd - rightEnd, topEnd)), c);
2673 sb.Draw(texture, new Rectangle(x + w - rightEnd, y, topEnd, rightEnd), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(texture.Width - rightEnd, 0, rightEnd, topEnd)), c);
2674 sb.Draw(texture, new Rectangle(x, y + topEnd, leftEnd, h - topEnd - bottomEnd), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(0, topEnd, leftEnd, texture.Height - topEnd - bottomEnd)), c);
2675 sb.Draw(texture, new Rectangle(x + leftEnd, y + topEnd, w - leftEnd - rightEnd, h - topEnd - bottomEnd), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(leftEnd, topEnd, texture.Width - leftEnd - rightEnd, texture.Height - topEnd - bottomEnd)), c);
2676 sb.Draw(texture, new Rectangle(x + w - rightEnd, y + topEnd, rightEnd, h - topEnd - bottomEnd), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(texture.Width - rightEnd, topEnd, rightEnd, texture.Height - topEnd - bottomEnd)), c);
2677 sb.Draw(texture, new Rectangle(x, y + h - bottomEnd, leftEnd, bottomEnd), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(0, texture.Height - bottomEnd, leftEnd, bottomEnd)), c);
2678 sb.Draw(texture, new Rectangle(x + leftEnd, y + h - bottomEnd, w - leftEnd - rightEnd, bottomEnd), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(leftEnd, texture.Height - bottomEnd, texture.Width - leftEnd - rightEnd, bottomEnd)), c);
2679 sb.Draw(texture, new Rectangle(x + w - rightEnd, y + h - bottomEnd, rightEnd, bottomEnd), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(texture.Width - rightEnd, texture.Height - bottomEnd, rightEnd, bottomEnd)), c);
2680 }

2695 public static void DrawPanel(Texture2D texture, int edgeWidth, int edgeShove, SpriteBatch spriteBatch, Vector2 position, float width, Color color)
2696 {
2697 spriteBatch.Draw(texture, position, new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(0, 0, edgeWidth, texture.Height)), color);
2698 spriteBatch.Draw(texture, new Vector2(position.X + (float)edgeWidth, position.Y), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(edgeWidth + edgeShove, 0, texture.Width - (edgeWidth + edgeShove) * 2, texture.Height)), color, 0f, Vector2.Zero, new Vector2((width - (float)(edgeWidth * 2)) / (float)(texture.Width - (edgeWidth + edgeShove) * 2), 1f), SpriteEffects.None, 0f);
2699 spriteBatch.Draw(texture, new Vector2(position.X + width - (float)edgeWidth, position.Y), new Rectangle?(new Rectangle(texture.Width - edgeWidth, 0, edgeWidth, texture.Height)), color);
2700 }

2707 Utils.DrawLine(sb, end, new Vector2(start.X, end.Y), colorStart, colorEnd, width);

2709 }

2711 // Token: 0x06001016 RID: 4118 RVA: 0x0040F630 File Offset: 0x0040D830
2712 public static void DrawLaser(SpriteBatch sb, Texture2D tex, Vector2 start, Vector2 end, Vector2 scale, Utils.LaserLineFraming framing)
2713 {
2714 Vector2 vector = Vector2.Normalize(end - start);
2715 float num = (end - start).Length();
2716 float num2 = vector.ToRotation() - 1.5707964f;
2717 if (vector.HasNaNs())
2718 {
2719 return;
2720 }
2721 float num3;
2722 Rectangle rectangle;
2723 Vector2 vector2;
2724 Color color;
2725 framing(0, start, num, default(Rectangle), out num3, out rectangle, out vector2, out color);
2726 sb.Draw(tex, start, new Rectangle?(rectangle), color, num2, rectangle.Size() / 2f, scale, SpriteEffects.None, 0f);
2727 num -= num3 * scale.Y;
2728 Vector2 vector3 = start + vector * ((float)rectangle.Height - vector2.Y) * scale.Y;
2729 if (num > 0f)
2730 {
2731 float num4 = 0f;
2732 while (num4 + 1f < num)
2733 {
2734 framing(1, vector3, num - num4, rectangle, out num3, out rectangle, out vector2, out color);
2735 if (num - num4 < (float)rectangle.Height)
2736 {
2737 num3 *= (num - num4) / (float)rectangle.Height;
2738 rectangle.Height = (int)(num - num4);
2739 }
2740 sb.Draw(tex, vector3, new Rectangle?(rectangle), color, num2, vector2, scale, SpriteEffects.None, 0f);
2741 num4 += num3 * scale.Y;
2742 vector3 += vector * num3 * scale.Y;
2743 }
2744 }
2745 framing(2, vector3, num, default(Rectangle), out num3, out rectangle, out vector2, out color);
2746 sb.Draw(tex, vector3, new Rectangle?(rectangle), color, num2, vector2, scale, SpriteEffects.None, 0f);
2747 }
2748
2749 // Token: 0x06001017 RID: 4119 RVA: 0x0040F7D6 File Offset: 0x0040D9D6

2751 {

2753 }
2754
2755 // Token: 0x06001018 RID: 4120 RVA: 0x0040F810 File Offset: 0x0040DA10
2756 public static void DrawLine(SpriteBatch spriteBatch, Vector2 start, Vector2 end, Color color)
2757 {
2758 float num = Vector2.Distance(start, end);
2759 Vector2 vector = (end - start) / num;
2760 Vector2 vector2 = start;
2761 Vector2 screenPosition = Main.screenPosition;
2762 float num2 = vector.ToRotation();
2763 for (float num3 = 0f; num3 <= num; num3 += 4f)
2764 {
2765 float num4 = num3 / num;
2766 spriteBatch.Draw(TextureAssets.BlackTile.Value, vector2 - screenPosition, null, new Color(new Vector4(num4, num4, num4, 1f) * color.ToVector4()), num2, Vector2.Zero, 0.25f, SpriteEffects.None, 0f);
2767 vector2 = start + num3 * vector;
2768 }
2769 }
2770
2771 // Token: 0x06001019 RID: 4121 RVA: 0x0040F8C4 File Offset: 0x0040DAC4
2772 public static void DrawLine(SpriteBatch spriteBatch, Vector2 start, Vector2 end, Color colorStart, Color colorEnd, float width)
2773 {
2774 float num = Vector2.Distance(start, end);
2775 float num2 = (end - start).ToRotation();
2776 int num3 = Math.Min(5, (int)num);
2777 for (int i = 0; i < num3; i++)
2778 {
2779 spriteBatch.Draw(TextureAssets.BlackTile.Value, Vector2.Lerp(start, end, (float)i / (float)num3) - Main.screenPosition, null, Color.Lerp(colorStart, colorEnd, ((float)i + 0.5f) / (float)num3), num2, Vector2.Zero, new Vector2(num / (float)num3 / 16f, width / 16f), SpriteEffects.None, 0f);
2780 }
2781 }

2820 public static void DrawSelectedCraftingBarIndicator(SpriteBatch spriteBatch, int craftX, int craftY)
2821 {

2823 Color ourFavoriteColor = Main.OurFavoriteColor;
2824 float num2 = 16f;
2825 for (float num3 = num2; num3 > 0f; num3 -= 1f)
2826 {
2827 float num4 = 1f - num3 / num2;
2828 spriteBatch.Draw(TextureAssets.BlackTile.Value, new Rectangle(craftX - 16, craftY + num + (int)num3 * -1, 32, 2), ourFavoriteColor * (num4 * 0.6f));
2829 }
2830 spriteBatch.Draw(TextureAssets.BlackTile.Value, new Rectangle(craftX - 16, craftY + num, 32, 4), ourFavoriteColor);
2831 }

2834 public static void DrawCursorSingle(SpriteBatch sb, Color color, float rot = float.NaN, float scale = 1f, Vector2 manualPosition = default(Vector2), int cursorSlot = 0, int specialMode = 0)
2835 {
2836 bool flag = false;
2837 bool flag2 = true;
2838 bool flag3 = true;
2839 Vector2 zero = Vector2.Zero;
2840 Vector2 vector = new Vector2((float)Main.mouseX, (float)Main.mouseY);
2841 if (manualPosition != Vector2.Zero)
2842 {
2843 vector = manualPosition;
2844 }
2845 if (float.IsNaN(rot))
2846 {
2847 rot = 0f;
2848 }
2849 else
2850 {
2851 flag = true;
2852 rot -= 2.3561945f;
2853 }
2854 if (cursorSlot == 4 || cursorSlot == 5)
2855 {
2856 flag2 = false;
2857 zero = new Vector2(8f);
2858 if (flag && specialMode == 0)
2859 {
2860 float num = rot;
2861 if (num < 0f)
2862 {
2863 num += 6.2831855f;
2864 }
2865 for (float num2 = 0f; num2 < 4f; num2 += 1f)
2866 {
2867 if (Math.Abs(num - 1.5707964f * num2) <= 0.7853982f)
2868 {
2869 rot = 1.5707964f * num2;
2870 break;
2871 }
2872 }
2873 }
2874 }
2875 Vector2 vector2 = Vector2.One;
2876 if ((Main.ThickMouse && cursorSlot == 0) || cursorSlot == 1)
2877 {
2878 vector2 = Main.DrawThickCursor(cursorSlot == 1);
2879 }
2880 if (flag2)
2881 {
2882 sb.Draw(TextureAssets.Cursors[cursorSlot].Value, vector + vector2 + Vector2.One, null, color.MultiplyRGB(new Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 0.5f)), rot, zero, scale * 1.1f, SpriteEffects.None, 0f);
2883 }
2884 if (flag3)
2885 {
2886 sb.Draw(TextureAssets.Cursors[cursorSlot].Value, vector + vector2, null, color, rot, zero, scale, SpriteEffects.None, 0f);
2887 }
2888 }

2890 // Token: 0x06001021 RID: 4129 RVA: 0x0040FCCC File Offset: 0x0040DECC
2891 public static bool TryOperateInLock(object _lock, Action action)
2892 {
2893 if (!Monitor.TryEnter(_lock))
2894 {
2895 return false;
2896 }
2897 bool flag;
2898 try
2899 {
2900 action();
2901 flag = true;
2902 }
2903 finally
2904 {
2905 Monitor.Exit(_lock);
2906 }
2907 return flag;
2908 }

2910 // Token: 0x06001022 RID: 4130 RVA: 0x0040FD08 File Offset: 0x0040DF08
2911 public static bool ParseCommandPrefix(string text, string prefix, out string remainder)
2912 {
2913 remainder = "";
2914 if (!text.StartsWith(prefix, true, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture))
2915 {
2916 return false;
2917 }
2918 if (text.Length == prefix.Length)
2919 {
2920 return true;
2921 }
2922 if (text[prefix.Length] != ' ')
2923 {
2924 return false;
2925 }
2926 remainder = text.Substring(prefix.Length + 1);
2927 return true;
2928 }
2929
2930 // Token: 0x06001023 RID: 4131 RVA: 0x0040FD60 File Offset: 0x0040DF60
2931 public static string TrimUserString(string s, int length)
2932 {
2933 if (s.Length <= length)
2934 {
2935 return s;
2936 }
2937 if (length > 0 && char.IsHighSurrogate(s[length - 1]))
2938 {
2939 length--;
2940 }
2941 return s.Substring(0, length);
2942 }
2943
2944 // Token: 0x06001024 RID: 4132 RVA: 0x0040FD8E File Offset: 0x0040DF8E
2945 public static string TrimLastCharacter(string s)
2946 {
2947 return Utils.TrimUserString(s, s.Length - 1);
2948 }
